metadata.title: About AlgoCoach
metadata.description: AlgoCoach is an AI-guided learning workspace that connects algorithm explanation, practice, assessment, feedback, and review.

hero.title: AlgoCoach
hero.description: An AI algorithm coach for students and job seekers who need more than a solution: a clear path from first idea to independent mastery.

introduce.title: Built for the moments when practice breaks down
introduce.description: Algorithm learners often know the syntax but still struggle to form an approach, interpret failures, and connect one solved problem to a durable learning path.

items.title: The blank-page problem
items.description: A progressive hint ladder gives the smallest useful nudge while keeping the learner responsible for the solution.

items.title: Feedback that arrives too late
items.description: Real execution results and evidence-based diagnosis explain failures while the reasoning is still fresh.

items.title: Fragmented learning paths
items.description: Goals, practice, assessment, and review share one learning record instead of living in disconnected tools.

items.title: Solved is not the same as learned
items.description: Counterexamples and review cards test assumptions and bring weak patterns back at the right moment.

benefits.title: AI assistance with visible boundaries
benefits.description: The product is designed to make feedback useful, traceable, and easy to challenge rather than asking learners to trust an opaque answer.

items.title: Grounded in actual results
items.description: Diagnostics cite compiler messages, runtime errors, or failed tests. When evidence is missing, the coach says what it cannot verify.

items.title: Progressive, not prescriptive
items.description: Hints escalate from concept to direction to pseudocode, preserving space for independent reasoning.

items.title: Learner control by default
items.description: Users can inspect feedback, correct the coach, reset local data, and practice without creating an account.

features.title: One workspace across the learning journey
features.description: AlgoCoach connects the activities that turn repeated problem solving into measurable skill growth.

items.title: Goal-based onboarding
items.description: Set a learning goal, preferred language, and weekly practice target.

items.title: Curated problem library
items.description: Practice core patterns across arrays, stacks, search, linked lists, dynamic programming, BFS, and DFS.

items.title: Real browser execution
items.description: Run JavaScript and Python in disposable workers with test output and a strict time limit.

items.title: AI coaching
items.description: Request diagnosis, a counterexample, progressive hints, or a focused follow-up conversation.

items.title: Independent assessment
items.description: Complete a timed two-problem check without AI hints, then review accuracy and weak topics.

items.title: Personalized review
items.description: Revisit mistakes, topic gaps, and review cards generated from real practice interactions.

faq.title: Product principles
faq.description: The choices behind the current MVP.

items.question: Who is AlgoCoach for?
items.answer: It is designed for programming students and job seekers who know basic coding and want a more structured way to learn algorithmic problem solving.

items.question: Is the AI treated as an authority?
items.answer: No. AI feedback can be wrong. The interface grounds diagnosis in observable results, reports provider failures explicitly, and gives users a correction path.

items.question: Does the MVP require a backend account?
items.answer: No. Visitors can practice locally; signing in enables account-backed cloud synchronization. Production-scale remote judging remains outside this version.

items.question: How are imported problems handled?
items.answer: The learner confirms the parsed draft and remains responsible for having the right to use the source material. The system does not claim to provide hidden tests.

cta.title: Practice the reasoning, not just the submission
cta.description: Open a problem and let the coach reveal only the next step you need.
